title: Decision on the European Commission’s failure to reply to a request for public access to documents concerning its 2024 decision to maintain the application of the ‘rule of law procedure’ in Hungary
text: The case was about the EU body's failure to reply to the complainant. Since the EU body replied, the case was closed as settled. The Ombudsman's inquiry did not in any way concern the substance of the matter raised by the complainant.
summary: The case was about the EU body's failure to reply to the complainant. Since the EU body replied, the case was closed as settled. The Ombudsman's inquiry did not in any way concern the substance of the matter raised by the complainant.
